name: claude-skill-b2-cloud-storage
description: Claude Skill for Backblaze B2 Cloud Storage management from the terminal. Manage buckets, list and search files, audit storage usage, detect stale or large objects, review security posture, and safely clean up data using natural language. Built on the Agent Skills specification and compatible with Claude Code and other skills-based agents.
readme:
# backblaze-labs/claude-skill-b2-cloud-storage

Claude Skill for Backblaze B2 Cloud Storage management from the terminal. Manage buckets, list and search files, audit storage usage, detect stale or large objects, review security posture, and safely clean up data using natural language. Built on the Agent Skills specification and compatible with Claude Code and other skills-based agents.
